description_long: This is a whimsical, steampunk-inspired caravan with a house-like structure mounted on a wheeled chassis. The exterior features a combination of wood and metal panels, with ornate details such as a large spoked wheel, a cylindrical smokestack, and decorative vents. The roof is pitched and ribbed, with two prominent chimneys and a domed vent, adding to its vintage industrial aesthetic. Windows of various shapes and sizes are distributed along the sides and front, and a small staircase leads up to a side door. The front of the caravan is rounded, resembling the front of a locomotive, complete with a cowcatcher and additional windows. The overall design suggests a mobile home or traveling wagon, blending Victorian and industrial motifs.
description: A steampunk-style caravan with wood and metal panels, ornate wheels, chimneys, and a locomotive-inspired front. Features include multiple windows, a side staircase, and a cylindrical smokestack.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded locomotive-like face, large spoked wheel, and central door with a circular window above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side staircase, cylindrical smokestack, and multiple windows along the wooden facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back wall with two chimneys, a domed vent, and the rear entry platform with steps.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals a simpler facade with a single large window and the ribbed metal roof extending the length of the caravan.
attribute_door_placement: left side, front half; rear center
attribute_wheel_configuration: two axles, four wheels (single wheels per axle)
